README.summary: A simple README file containing a 'Hello World!' message, likely serving as a basic introduction or placeholder in a project.

src/pipeline/overfit_test.py.summary: This script performs an overfitting test for a machine learning model by training it on a small dataset and checking if it can achieve 100% accuracy. It generates synthetic data, preprocesses it, and trains a FullModel instance with a custom configuration to test its ability to overfit.

functions.name: main
functions.description: The main function that orchestrates the overfitting test. It loads the configuration, generates synthetic data, preprocesses it, creates a model, and trains it with a custom configuration.
functions.params: None

library/src/main/res/values-mdpi/dimens..summary: This XML file defines dimension values for user interface components in an Android application, specifically for medium-density (mdpi) screens.

library/src/main/res/drawable/background.summary: This XML file defines a background shape for a card view, providing a white background with rounded corners.

app/.gitignore.summary: This .gitignore file specifies files or directories that Git should ignore in the app directory. Its main purpose is to prevent unnecessary files from being committed to the Git repository, such as build artifacts. By ignoring these files, the repository remains clean and focused on source code.

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: The BatAdapter class is a custom RecyclerView adapter designed to display a list of items with checkboxes and dividers. It handles item clicks, checkbox state changes, and animations for adding, moving, or removing items.

functions.name: BatAdapter
functions.description: Constructor for the BatAdapter class, initializing the adapter with a list of items and optional listeners for item interactions and animations.
functions.params: goals (List<BatModel>): list of items to display, listener (BatListener): listener for item interactions, animator (BatItemAnimator): animator for item animations

functions.name: setRadioButtonColor
functions.description: Sets the color resource for the radio buttons in the adapter.
functions.params: drawable (int): color resource for the radio buttons
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: setDividerColor
functions.description: Sets the color resource for the dividers in the adapter and makes them visible.
functions.params: color (int): color resource for the dividers
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: setOnOutsideClickListener
functions.description: Sets a listener for outside clicks on the adapter items.
functions.params: listener (OnOutsideClickedListener): listener for outside clicks
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: setTextColor
functions.description: Sets the color resource for the text in the adapter.
functions.params: color (int): color resource for the text
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: setTypeface
functions.description: Sets the typeface for the text in the adapter.
functions.params: typeface (Typeface): typeface for the text
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: setOnItemClickListener
functions.description: Sets a listener for item clicks in the adapter.
functions.params: listener (OnItemClickListener): listener for item clicks
functions.returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

functions.name: onCreateViewHolder
functions.description: Creates a new ViewHolder instance for the adapter.
functions.params: parent (ViewGroup): parent view group, viewType (int): view type

functions.name: onBindViewHolder
functions.description: Binds the data to the ViewHolder instance.
functions.params: holder (ViewHolder): ViewHolder instance, position (int): position of the item

functions.name: getColor
functions.description: Gets the color resource from the context.
functions.params: context (Context): context, color (int): color resource

functions.name: getItemCount
functions.description: Gets the number of items in the adapter.

functions.name: onCheckedChanged
functions.description: Handles the checkbox state change event.
functions.params: buttonView (CompoundButton): checkbox view, isChecked (boolean): checked state

functions.name: setChecked
functions.description: Sets the checked state of the checkbox.
functions.params: button (CompoundButton): checkbox view, checked (boolean): checked state

functions.name: notify
functions.description: Notifies the adapter about changes to the data.
functions.params: animationType (int): animation type, position (int): position of the item, to (int): target position

functions.name: onAnimationStarted
functions.description: Handles the animation start event.

functions.name: onAnimationFinished
functions.description: Handles the animation finish event.

library/src/main/res/anim/increasing_ani.summary: This XML file defines an animation that scales a view from zero size to its original size over a duration of 300 milliseconds, creating an increasing effect.

library/src/main/res/layout/bat_add_view.summary: This XML layout file defines a FrameLayout for displaying two AppCompatImageViews, representing vertical and horizontal cursors, in the center of the view.

library/src/main/res/drawable/header_bac.summary: This XML file defines a rounded rectangle shape used as a background for headers, providing a visually appealing and consistent design element throughout the application.

app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml.summary: This is the main AndroidManifest.xml file, which serves as the central configuration file for an Android application. It declares the application's components, such as activities, and defines the application's metadata, such as its icon and label.

app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazing.summary: This Java class represents a Goal object, implementing the BatModel interface. It provides properties for goal name and checked status, along with getter and setter methods for these properties.

functions.name: Goal
functions.description: Constructor to create a new Goal object with the given name.
functions.params: name (String): the name of the goal

functions.name: getName
functions.description: Gets the name of the goal.
functions.params: None
functions.returns: String: the name of the goal

functions.name: setName
functions.description: Sets the name of the goal.
functions.params: name (String): the new name of the goal

functions.name: setChecked
functions.description: Sets the checked status of the goal.
functions.params: checked (boolean): the new checked status of the goal

functions.name: isChecked
functions.description: Checks if the goal is checked.
functions.params: None
functions.returns: boolean: true if the goal is checked, false otherwise

functions.name: getText
functions.description: Gets the text representation of the goal, which is the same as its name.
functions.params: None
functions.returns: String: the text representation of the goal

gradle.properties.summary: This file contains project-wide Gradle settings, allowing for configuration of the build environment, such as JVM arguments and parallel mode.

app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazing.summary: This Java file represents an Android activity that demonstrates the usage of a custom recycler view with animation capabilities. It extends AppCompatActivity and implements several listener interfaces to handle user interactions and item manipulation.

functions.name: onCreate
functions.description: Initializes the activity, sets up the toolbar, and configures the recycler view with a custom adapter and animator.
functions.params: savedInstanceState (Bundle): the saved instance state

functions.name: add
functions.description: Adds a new item to the beginning of the list and notifies the adapter to animate the addition.
functions.params: string (String): the text to be added

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Removes an item from the list at the specified position and notifies the adapter to animate the removal.
functions.params: position (int): the position of the item to be removed

functions.name: move
functions.description: Moves an item from one position to another in the list and notifies the adapter to animate the movement.
functions.params: from (int): the initial position, to (int): the target position

functions.name: onClick
functions.description: Handles item clicks by displaying a toast message with the item's text.
functions.params: item (BatModel): the clicked item, position (int): the position of the item

functions.name: onOutsideClicked
functions.description: Reverts the animation when the outside area of the recycler view is clicked.
functions.params: none

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: This interface defines a listener for animation events, allowing classes to react when specific animations start.

functions.name: onIncreaseAnimationStarted
functions.description: Notifies the listener that an increase animation has started.
functions.params: None

functions.name: onDecreaseAnimationStarted
functions.description: Notifies the listener that a decrease animation has started.
functions.params: None

functions.name: onAddAnimationStarted
functions.description: Notifies the listener that an add animation has started.
functions.params: None

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: The BatModel interface defines a contract for objects that need to provide a checked state and text, likely used in a list or other collection of items.

functions.name: isChecked
functions.description: Checks if the model is currently checked.
functions.returns: boolean: the checked state of the model

functions.name: getText
functions.description: Gets the text associated with the model.
functions.returns: String: the text of the model

functions.name: setChecked
functions.description: Sets the checked state of the model.
functions.params: checked (boolean): the new checked state

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: This interface defines a listener for move animations, providing callbacks for when the animation starts and finishes.

functions.name: onAnimationStarted
functions.description: Called when the move animation starts.
functions.params: None

functions.name: onAnimationFinished
functions.description: Called when the move animation finishes.
functions.params: None

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: This interface defines a listener for outside click events, allowing components to react when a click occurs outside their boundaries.

functions.name: onOutsideClicked
functions.description: Notifies the listener that a click has occurred outside the component.
functions.params: None

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: This utility class provides various animation methods for views, including showing, hiding, rotating, scaling, and moving. It simplifies the process of animating views in an Android application.

functions.name: show
functions.description: Makes a view visible by animating its alpha value to 1.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be shown

functions.name: hide
functions.description: Hides a view by animating its alpha value to 0.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be hidden

functions.name: rotate
functions.description: Rotates a view by a specified angle.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be rotated, value (int): the rotation angle, endAction (Runnable): an optional action to be performed after the animation

functions.name: showViews
functions.description: Makes multiple views visible by animating their alpha values to 1.
functions.params: views (View...): the views to be shown

functions.name: hideViews
functions.description: Hides multiple views by animating their alpha values to 0.
functions.params: views (View...): the views to be hidden

functions.name: scaleXViews
functions.description: Scales multiple views horizontally by a specified factor.
functions.params: value (float): the scale factor, views (View...): the views to be scaled

functions.name: scaleX
functions.description: Scales a view horizontally by a specified factor.
functions.params: value (float): the scale factor, view (View): the view to be scaled

functions.name: moveX
functions.description: Moves a view horizontally by a specified distance.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be moved, value (float): the distance to move

functions.name: moveX
functions.description: Moves a view horizontally by a specified distance and performs an action after the animation.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be moved, value (float): the distance to move, endAction (Runnable): the action to be performed after the animation

functions.name: animateAlpha
functions.description: Animates the alpha value of a view to a specified value.
functions.params: view (View): the view to be animated, alpha (float): the target alpha value, endAction (Runnable): an optional action to be performed after the animation

functions.name: showKeyboard
functions.description: Shows the soft keyboard for a view.
functions.params: context (Context): the application context, view (View): the view for which the keyboard should be shown

library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beama.summary: This Java class defines a constant for animation duration in milliseconds, providing a reusable value throughout the application.
